# LC_SYMSEG

**Command ID:** `0x03`

**Obsolete.** Specifies the offset and size of a GNU-style symbol table segment. This command predates the modern `LC_SYMTAB` command and is not generated by any current Apple toolchain.

## Fields

| Name | Description | Offset | Size | Type |
|------|-------------|--------|------|------|
| Command ID | Load command identifier (`LC_SYMSEG`) | 0 | 4 | `UInt32` |
| Command Size | Total size of this load command (16 bytes) | 4 | 4 | `UInt32` |
| Offset | File offset of the symbol segment | 8 | 4 | `UInt32` |
| Size | Size of the symbol segment in bytes | 12 | 4 | `UInt32` |

**Fixed size:** 16 bytes

## See Also

- [LC_SYMTAB](LC_SYMTAB.md) -- Modern symbol table command
